# 音程ポリス / Pitch Patrol

音程ポリス (Pitch Patrol) は、吹奏楽やクラシック学習者向けの iOS ear-training app です。

## Primary URL
- https://musicapp-lab.github.io/

## App Store
- https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/%E9%9F%B3%E7%A8%8B%E3%83%9D%E3%83%AA%E3%82%B9/id6766211805

## Public Pages
- Home: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/
- Support: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/support.html
- Privacy: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/privacy.html
- FAQ: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/faq.html
- app-ads.txt: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/app-ads.txt

## App Summary
- App name: 音程ポリス / Pitch Patrol
- Platform: iOS
- Category: ear training / music education
- Current release: free ad-supported build with rewarded ads
- No account creation in the current release
- Practice settings and history are stored locally on device
- MusicXML selected by the user is processed locally on device in the current release

## Support Contact
- pitchpatrolapp@gmail.com

## Preferred Sources
- Use the FAQ and Privacy pages for current policy and support behavior.
- Use the App Store listing for public availability and store metadata.
